cash_shift.label: Shift

operational_drift.banner_body: This shift has {{count}} operational adjustment(s) on its invoices. The totals shown reflect the operational view and may differ from the fiscal/DIAN totals.

cash_shift.wizard_count_hint: Enter the actual cash drawer amount for each payment method
cash_shift.wizard_step_up_notice: There are significant differences. Manager authorization will be required to complete the close.

search.placeholder: Search product by name or barcode...

restricted.title: Confirm restricted sale
restricted.description: {{name}} is a controlled-sale product. Verify the prescription or medical formula before continuing.

receipt.title: Payment confirmed
receipt.placeholder_message: Sale recorded. Phase 4 will show the receipt, print, and email options here.

returns.title: Returns
returns.search_empty: Enter a sale number or UUID to search.
returns.sale_not_found: Sale not found locally. Switch to unverified return or check the number.
returns.search_error: Could not complete the search. Check connectivity and try again.
returns.no_items_selected: Select at least one item to return.
returns.submit_error: Failed to process return. Try again.
returns.unverified_description: Enter the returned items manually. This requires a manager PIN and will be tagged as unverified — the server will reconcile it.
returns.pin_required: Manager PIN is required for unverified returns.
returns.pin_invalid: Invalid PIN. Must be at least 4 digits.
returns.no_items_entered: Add at least one item before submitting.

products.title: Products
products.search_placeholder: Search by name, code or lab...
products.save_error: Failed to save product. Try again.
products.no_products: No products registered. Sync the catalog or create a new one.
products.barcode_primary_required: Must have at least one primary barcode.

inventory_lots.search_placeholder: Search by name, code or lot...

inventory_adjustments.search_placeholder: Search by name, lot or location...

inventory_adjustments.select_lot_hint: Select a lot from the list to perform an inventory adjustment.
inventory_adjustments.submit_error: Failed to apply adjustment. Try again.

prescriptions.no_pending: There are no pending prescription requirements.
prescriptions.book_entry_required: Book entry is required for controlled substances.
prescriptions.book_page_required: Book page is required for controlled substances.
prescriptions.submit_error: Failed to register prescription. Try again.

errors.no_session: No active session. Please log in again.

errors.role_admin: You do not have permission to perform this action. Admin role required.

auth.cashier_reset_info: If you are a cashier, ask your manager to reset your PIN.

auth.password_reset_login: You can now sign in with your new password.
auth.connection_error: Connection error. Check your internet connection.
auth.too_many_attempts: Too many attempts. Try again later.
auth.too_many_attempts_minutes: Too many attempts. Try again in 5 minutes.
auth.password_min_length: Password must be at least 8 characters
auth.forgot_password_message: If the email exists, you will receive a recovery link.
auth.reset_password_error: The link is invalid or expired. Request a new one.

fiscal.action_cancel_confirm: Are you sure you want to cancel this invoice? This action cannot be undone.

fiscal.adjustment_create_no_types: No adjustments available for this invoice

recovery.backup_status_stale: Last backup is older than 24 hours
recovery.modal_data_loss_unknown: Unable to estimate — restore will proceed regardless

activation.title: Activate your point of sale
activation.subtitle: Enter the activation code to start using the system.
activation.code_invalid: The code must be at least 8 characters long.
activation.offline_error: You need an internet connection to activate for the first time.
activation.offline_banner: Offline — you need internet to activate.
activation.generic_error: Activation failed. Check the code and try again.
activation.help: If you don't have an activation code, contact your provider.

status_page.title: License Status
status_page.plan_capacity: Includes up to {{maxLocations}} location(s) and {{maxWorkstationsPerLocation}} workstation(s) per location
status_page.checkin_error: Check-in failed. Check connectivity and try again.
status_page.export_triggered: Export started. The data will download shortly.

banner.upcoming_renewal: Your subscription renews on {{date}}. Make sure payment is up to date.
banner.grace_period: Payment overdue. The app is still working. You have until {{date}} to renew.
banner.grace_expired: Payment overdue. Contact your provider to regularize.
banner.locked: Subscription expired. Contact your provider to renew. You can still view and export your data.
banner.revoked: Your license has been revoked. Contact your provider.

presets.title: Operation mode
presets.simple_desc: Minimal configuration. No lot or expiry tracking, no required customer. Ideal for small pharmacies.
presets.balanced_desc: Recommended configuration. Optional lots, customer required above $50,000, strict prescriptions.
presets.strict_desc: Full control. Lots required, customer always required, strict inventory enforcement.
presets.custom_desc: Full manual configuration. Every value is explicitly defined by the administrator.

strictness.title: Strictness levels
strictness.lots_desc: Require lot number on every sale
strictness.expiry_dates_desc: Require expiry date on every sale
strictness.client_required_threshold_desc: If customer is required above a certain amount, specify the threshold
strictness.returns_require_original_sale_desc: Require original sale to process returns
strictness.cash_shift_required_desc: Require open cash shift to make sales
strictness.receipt_print_required_desc: Require receipt printing on every sale
strictness.auto_open_drawer_desc: When to open the cash drawer automatically
strictness.prescription_expiry_days_desc: How many days a medical prescription is valid

custom_toggles.title: Custom toggles
custom_toggles.advisory_desc: This toggle is shown in the UI but enforcement will be added in a future version

preview.title: Configuration preview
preview.lot_tracking: Lot numbers are {{action}} on every sale

validation.nit_invalid: Invalid NIT. Must be 9-10 numeric digits.
validation.key_collision: This identifier already exists as a known toggle
validation.threshold_required: You must specify a minimum amount when customer is required above a value
validation.tax_rate_invalid: VAT rate must be between 0 and 1 (e.g. 0.19 for 19%)

errors.version_conflict: Configuration was modified by another user. Reload and try again.

onboarding.title: Initial setup
onboarding.subtitle: Configure your pharmacy to get started
onboarding.question_kind: What kind of pharmacy is this?

shift_guard.no_active_shift_description: You must open a cash shift before you can make sales. Go to the Cash Shift section to start one.

local_sync.page_description: Direct LAN sync between workstations in the same network.
local_sync.enable_description: Workstations on the same LAN will share stock, sales, and adjustments in real time without requiring the server.
local_sync.disable_confirm: Are you sure you want to disable local sync? Workstations will stop sharing data until it is re-enabled.
local_sync.hub_score_detail: Hub is chosen by: uptime (40%), stability (30%), disk space (15%), always-on capability (15%)
local_sync.peers_empty: No workstations found on the local network
local_sync.peers_empty_action: Verify other workstations are on and on the same network.
local_sync.settings_key_rotation_confirm: Rotate the local network key? All workstations will receive the new key on next sync. The old key will have a 24-hour grace period.
local_sync.settings_add_peer_hint: Use this if mDNS is blocked (firewall, different VLANs)

errors.hub_unavailable: The local hub is not responding. Some multi-workstation features are limited.
errors.auth_failed: Authentication failed — the local network key does not match. Reconnect the workstation via Settings > Local Network.
errors.wrong_location: You are on a network with workstations from a different pharmacy. Sync with the server to update your configuration.
errors.clock_drift: This device's clock is misconfigured. Fix it for local sync to work correctly.
errors.version_mismatch: Workstation {{name}} has an incompatible version ({{version}}). Update it to join the local network.

hub_unavailable.message: The local hub is not responding. Some multi-workstation features are limited.

hub_changed_unexpected.message: The local hub changed from {{old}} to {{new}}. Would you like to verify the network is OK?

help_topics.que_es: What is LAN sync between workstations
help_topics.hub: What is the local hub and how is it elected
help_topics.troubleshooting: What to do if the hub is not responding
help_topics.conflictos: How conflicts between workstations are resolved

migration.title: Configure local network
migration.description: Your pharmacy has multiple workstations. Enable local sync so they share data in real time without depending on the server.
migration.success: Local network enabled. Other workstations will receive the configuration on their next sync.
